utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with costs: 1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance explicitly, with monthly and annual costs, plus features mentioning cardiac emergencies and 24/7 support; fully specified. 2) property_coverage: home/contents insurance with monthly and annual costs and features; fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: travel insurance with policies listed, each with monthly and annual costs, and aggregated totals; fully specified. 4) additional_services: enhancement services with monthly and annual costs and totals; fully specified. 5) total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown including totals and savings; fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to map each item named in the final coverage plan to the exact matching item name in the ground-truth ratings and return its numeric rating. The final plan includes: PrimeCare Premium (Physical + Mental Health) which corresponds to PrimeCare Premium Plan under both physical and mental health, EliteHome Premium Coverage which matches exactly under property_protection.home_content, PrimeTravel Premium Plan which matches exactly under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance, Isabella's Adventure Travel Coverage which has no corresponding item in the ground-truth list (the closest is Adventure Travel Coverage, but the names differ, so it cannot be mapped), Premium Insurance Membership which matches exactly under general_services. Enhanced Services Package does not match any item in the ground-truth ratings. Therefore, we provide ratings only for items that exactly match names in the ground-truth: PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical health) rating 10, PrimeCare Premium Plan (mental health) rating 10, EliteHome Premium Coverage rating 10, PrimeTravel Premium Plan rating 10, Premium Insurance Membership rating 10. Items without exact matches are omitted as their ratings are unknown.
